analysis_result: 8 MPNST samples are in the MPNST-G2 methylation subgroup (Methylation_Group = 'MPNST_G2' in MOESM4).
denominator_used: N = 108 samples in the Clinical Data sheet of 41467_2023_38432_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx (full cohort). Of these, 8 have Methylation_Group == 'MPNST_G2'.
assumptions_made: Used the exact string match 'MPNST_G2' in the Methylation_Group column; all 8 samples with this methylation group label also have Tumor Type == 'MPNST' (no 'Low-Grade MPNST' or other types are assigned to MPNST_G2), so the count is unambiguous whether interpreted as 'samples labeled MPNST_G2' or 'MPNST-tumor-type samples labeled MPNST_G2'.
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - File: 41467_2023_38432_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx, sheet 'Clinical Data'
   - Shape: 108 rows x 15 columns
   - Relevant columns: Tumor_ID, Tumor Type, Methylation_Group

B. COHORT DEFINITION
   - Start: 108 samples (full Clinical Data sheet)
   - Filter: Methylation_Group == 'MPNST_G2' -> 8 remaining

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Methylation_Group value_counts(dropna=False):
       PremalignantNF_G3        29
       Cutaneous NF_G7          21
       Benign_NF-G4             20
       Cutaneous  NF_G6         12
       Sporadic Spinal NF_G5    10
       MPNST_G2                  8
       MPNST_G1                  8
   - Tumor Type of the 8 MPNST_G2 samples: all 8 are 'MPNST' (0 are 'Low-Grade MPNST' or any other type).

D. COMPUTATION
   - Numerator: df[df['Methylation_Group'] == 'MPNST_G2'] -> 8 rows
   - Denominator: 108 (full Clinical Data table)
   - Sample IDs: M1677, M1933, M2325, M2377, M2491, M4719, M9413, M9450

E. RESULT
   - 8 samples (8/108 = 7.4% of the full cohort) are classified as MPNST_G2.
   - All 8 are of Tumor Type 'MPNST', so 'MPNST samples in MPNST-G2' = 8.

F. CAVEATS
   - The MPNST_G2 group consists entirely of MPNST tumors; no Low-Grade MPNST or other tumor types are in this methylation subgroup, so the answer is robust to interpretation.
   - Matched exact string 'MPNST_G2' (with underscore), as specified.
